name: Nuvocargo
long_description:
Nuvocargo is your AI partner for North American truckload freight - built for manufacturers, retailers, distributors, and shippers who want real outcomes, not more software to manage.

We help you:
- Cut freight costs — eliminate manual work, reduce software spend, reduce freight spend
- Improve service levels — accountable to your metrics: OTIF, OTP, OTD, landed cost
- Simplify your tech stack — replace 15+ tools with one managed platform
- Stay ahead on AI — we continuously swap in the best AI models and tools so you don’t have to

Access 300K+ carriers, deploy 12+ AI agents with 70%+ automated truckload touchpoints. ROI in weeks.

We don’t sell software - we sell outcomes, powered by AI and human freight experts. Go to www.nuvocargo.com​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ for a demo. 

Backed by $85m+ from leading investors - QED, Tiger Global, NFX, Hi, YC, the founders of Ramp, Nubank, Deel, Replit, Rappi, Dropbox, among others. 

Recognized as Fast Company’s Most Innovative Companies globally, FreightWaves 100, and Y Combinator Top Companies.
one_liner: Your AI partner for North America truckload freight
